Primary_Text: khut mebelin ate te penuh hakhapen balik lah kalaki me tanoh alas khut medalan kiding memengketi nangkihe datas tanoh kakho .
Translated_Text: With encouragement and hope they returned to the Alas Land on foot entering the Karo highlands.
Comment: This appears to be a translation of part of the story from https://kaisosogarcia.blogspot.com/2016/04/si-layakh-cerita-rakyat-dari-kutacane.html. However, I have been told the Alas is good in it.

Other_Translation: Dengan berbesar hati dan penuh harapan pulanglah mereka ke Tanah Alas dengan berjalan kaki memasuki dataran tinggi Tanah Karo.
